home_room_1.line: Well, we are finally here. I didn't get a lot of sleep
however. Moving all those boxes took a lot of energy and I didn't sleep very well because
I should get ready for my first day of school. Now, where did I leave my bag...

home_room_2.line: I hope I have not forgotten anything. I don't want to make a fool of myself.
Ah! — look at the time. Time to go downstairs and head to school.

entering_school.line: So much noise... I wish I could go home already.
But I can't miss school on the first day.

school_emiel.line: I - Sorry, excuse me. C—Could I borrow a pen? I...forgot mine.
Hmmm? Oh! Yeah, of course. Wait, give me a moment.
`Hands the player character a vibrant looking pen`
Here you go. You can keep it. See it as a welcome gift!
Thanks, I appreciate that. Are you sure I can have this?
